description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test-p4c-debian that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, and on merge groups to main. The workflow has three jobs: test-ubuntu24, test-ubuntu22, and test-ubuntu22-tofino, each running on a different Ubuntu version, checking out the repository with submodules, using ccache, building with GCC, and running tests with ctest. The test-ubuntu22 job uses a matrix strategy to test with different Unity and GTest configurations.
